title: Section 58
content: 1[58. Licensing of private warehouses.--The Principal Commissioner of Customs or Commissioner of Customs may, subject to such conditions as may be prescribed, licence a private warehouse wherein dutiable goods imported by or on behalf of the licensee may be deposited.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 125, ibid., for section 58 (w.e.f. 14-5-2016).
